rootCauseHypothesis:
The hosting-side failure is most likely due to the production frontend rendering a stale or misconfigured header navigation: the tournaments entry is either omitted from the active nav config, hidden by a feature flag/locale condition, or not included in the deployed build. The page still shows tournament-related content in the body, but the main navigation component on the hosted site does not expose a primary "Tournaments" link, which is why the test fails. Underlying error: TEST FAILURE

A primary 'Tournaments' navigation entry in the header is missing — the site shows tournament content on the page but no tournament button/link is present in the main navigation.

Observations:
- The header navigation contains the 'Özellikler' (Features) link (visible in the top navigation).
- No 'Turnuva' / 'Turnuvalar' / 'Yarış' button or link is present in the header/main navigation.
- The page body contains a 'TURNUVALAR' section and a 'Yarış ve Kazan' card, but these are in-page content rather than primary navigation items.

recommendedFixTarget.rationale: Update the deployed header/nav component so it includes a primary navigation item for tournaments (for example, a visible "Turnuvalar" or "Tournaments" link/button) and make sure the production build is actually serving the updated frontend. If the link already exists in source but not in production, the likely fix is to rebuild/redeploy the app and clear any CDN/cache layer so the header reflects the current navigation config. Also verify responsive/mobile variants and localization logic don’t hide or rename the item in the main nav.

evidence.summary: Step 3 'Scroll down on the page' passed.

Step 4 'Expected the 'Özellikler' (Features) link to be visible.' failed. Error: TEST FAILURE

A primary 'Tournaments' navigation entry in the header is missing — the site shows tournament content on the page but no tournament button/link is present in the main navigation.

Observations:
- The header navigation contains the 'Özellikler' (Features) link (visible in the top navigation).
- No 'Turnuva' / 'Turnuvalar' / 'Yarış' button or link is present in the header/main navigation.
- The page body contains a 'TURNUVALAR' section and a 'Yarış ve Kazan' card, but these are in-page content rather than primary navigation items.
